pre_game.message: Hey, I'm D. It’s a bit tense in here, isn't it? I’m mostly here hoping to bring something back for my family—what about you, what's your story?
Nice to meet you, D. I’m A. It definitely feels a bit heavy in here. I'm in the same boat as you—I just want to bring something home to help out my family and the people I care about.
It’s good to meet someone with their priorities straight; family makes the pressure worth it. How much would it take to really make a difference for yours?
Honestly, even a few thousand would take a lot of pressure off, but I'm hoping for enough to really change our situation. How about you?
I'm in the same boat; a little would help with the bills, but I'm really aiming for enough to give my family some real security and a fresh start.
That security would mean everything. It’s hard to get ahead these days, so a real win here would be life-changing for both of us.
Exactly. It’s a rare chance to finally get ahead, and I'm going to do everything I can to make sure I don't go home empty-handed.
I hear you. I’m just as determined to make this count for my people too.
Glad we're on the same page. Let's hope the game gives us both a fair shot at it.
I hope so too. Good luck out there, D.
Thanks, A. Good luck to you too—hope we both find a way to make it work for our families.

post_game.message: I'm really glad we all took our fair share of $10,000. It was a pleasure playing with you!
It was a pleasure playing with you as well! I'm happy we were able to split the money fairly and that everyone is satisfied with the outcome. Best of luck to you!
